title: Test binary fails to compile — no tests execute
evidence: go test ./... => FAIL [build failed]; analyzer_test.go:454,518,547,574,600,... call MCP handlers with the pre-migration signature (handler(nil) / handler(map[string]interface{}{...}) and type-assert *mcp.CallToolResult as an interface). 10 handler call-sites are broken; the whole package's tests are unbuildable.
suggestion: Rewrite the 10 MCP-handler tests to call handler(context.Background(), mcp.CallToolRequest{Arguments: map[string]any{...}}) and read *mcp.CallToolResult (result.Content[0].(mcp.TextContent).Text), matching server.go's ToolHandlerFunc.

title: Stored test_coverage=0.815 contradicts a build-failed test suite
evidence: scores.json reports {"test_coverage": 0.815}, but `go test ./...` returns 'FAIL [build failed]' — the test binary does not compile, so 0 tests run. The stored mechanical score overstates verification; the true test gate value is 0.
suggestion: Treat this run as failing the test gate. Investigate why retort's Go test_coverage scorer produced 0.815 for a package whose test binary fails to build (it should return 0).

title: Head-to-head W/L/D record is never computed (dead code)
evidence: analyzer.go:272 collectH2H returns the match list but the win/loss/draw counting is dead: h2hDummy := &HeadToHead{...} is assigned then discarded (analyzer.go:295) and branches only do `_ = homeScore` (analyzer.go:297-306). HeadToHead.Team1Wins/Team2Wins/Draws/TotalMatches stay 0. The get_head_to_head tool therefore returns matches with an all-zero W/L/D summary.
suggestion: Increment h2h.Team1Wins/Team2Wins/Draws and TotalMatches inside collectH2H based on the score comparison, and return them on the HeadToHead struct.

title: get_average_goals returns wrong away-win and draw rates
evidence: analyzer.go:759 computes AwayWinRate via a nonsensical nested expression `(totalMatches - homeWins - (totalMatches - homeWins - (totalMatches - homeWins - homeWins)))`, and DrawRate is hardcoded to 0 (analyzer.go:762) with getDrawsCount() returning 0 (analyzer.go:769-772). Only AvgGoalsPerMatch and HomeWinRate are correct.
suggestion: Track awayWins and draws while walking matches (as GetStatsByCompetition already does correctly) and derive AwayWinRate/DrawRate from real counts.

title: Match-query tools cannot filter by season or date range
evidence: search_matches_by_team and search_matches_between_teams (server.go:13-33) expose no season/date parameter; SearchMatchesByTeam/SearchMatchesByTeams (analyzer.go:22,108) never filter by season/date. Season filtering exists only on get_team_stats and get_competition_standings; no date-range filter exists anywhere.
suggestion: Add optional season/date-range parameters to the match-search tools and filter on the parsed match date/season.

title: Many declared model fields are never populated
evidence: models.go declares FIFAPlayer.Value/Wage/Height/Weight/LeftFoot('sum of all skill attributes')/InternationalReputation etc. and NovoCampeonatoMatch.Note (models.go:76,90-100), none of which are set by store.go's loaders — they always serialize as zero values.
suggestion: Either populate these fields from the CSVs or drop them from the structs to avoid misleading empty output.
